strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with strong recent TypeScript/Node.js and React work (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing tooling authorship, plus cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin and Python are not listed; Java exposure appears dated and limited
JS-ecosystem testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly named despite strong testing background

key_factors.factor: Depth and recency of TypeScript/Node/React fullstack experience
AI agent and MCP development experience (explicit JD requirement)

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with current, relevant TypeScript/Node.js and React product work, direct AI agent infrastructure experience, cloud and container proficiency, and a demonstrated software craftsmanship culture (TDD, CI/CD, code review, knowledge sharing) that matches the role's quality expectations. Gaps are narrow and learnable: Nest.js specifically, and secondary languages Kotlin/Python. Given his polyglot track record (TypeScript, D, Java, C++, Swift, PHP), picking up Nest.js is low risk.
